calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner Larry Vuckovich, in pro per.

The Court asked Mr. Vuckovich why he had trnsferred assets of the estate to himself without Court authorization. Mr. Vuckovich responded that he was without the benefit of legal assistance, and was unaware that even where he was the sole beneficiary he needed to set up an estate account. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
